reference: Should I throw away my toothbrush if I had chlamydia? My partner and I have been treated. We have had sexual intercourse a few times while being treated but with a condom. Does this make the medications less effective? Am I putting myself at higher risk? I have been given Doxycycline hyclate one hundred milligrams, an injection of something in my butt, and four tablets of Azithromycin. Will I still be able to get pregnant after all of this?
text: Should I throw away my toothbrush if I had chlamydia? My partner and I have been treated. We have had sexual intercourse a few times while being treated, but with a condom. Does this make the medications less effective? Am I putting myself at higher risk? I have been given doxycycline highclate 100 milligrams, an injection of something in my butt, and four tablets of azizromycin. Will I still be able to get pregnant after all of this?
